programs.title: These Woods Are Haunted
programs.sub_title: I Was Afraid of This Thing and I Was Frozen
programs.desc: (M) A father and son stumble across Bigfoot while camping deep in the woods of Michigan. A young woman is stalked by a mysterious presence on a haunted bridge in Georgia.

programs.title: Ghost Loop
programs.desc: (M) The Spirit Hunters head to South Jordan, Utah, where a demonic entity is tormenting a woman and her son. The team steps up to cast out the demon and save the beleaguered family.
